_meta.source: AI value-chain leverage analysis (own research, Jun 2026): 19 countries scored 0-3 on eight leverage axes; leverage index = sum /24 (breadth); top10 = irreplaceability-weighted strategic rank.
_meta.caveats: Data 2024-26; announced GW and fund sizes are targets, not built. Refresh before external use. Niobium overweighted in Brazil's 'key' line relative to the working paper's correction (see leverage-outside-the-chain, section 2).

countries.name: Taiwan
countries.key: TSMC >90% of leading-edge fabrication + CoWoS advanced packaging - the most indispensable manufacturing node.
countries.caveat: Diplomatically locked out of GPAI/UN/AISI network; geopolitical flashpoint.

countries.name: Netherlands
countries.key: ASML - sole supplier of EUV lithography; the single hardest chokepoint in AI hardware.
countries.caveat: Frontier leverage rests on one firm; #1 on responsible-AI (GIRAI).

countries.name: South Korea
countries.key: SK Hynix + Samsung ~80-88% of HBM (the AI-memory bottleneck) + Samsung fabs; AI Basic Act in force Jan 2026.

countries.name: Japan
countries.key: Silicon wafers (~53%) + EUV photoresist (~100% sub-7nm) + Tokyo Electron tools; led the G7 Hiroshima Process.

countries.name: United Arab Emirates
countries.key: MGX/ADIA/Mubadala capital + Stargate UAE (5GW planned) + Falcon/MBZUAI; cheap energy.

countries.name: India
countries.key: AI talent scale (#1 skill penetration) + 1.4B market & Aadhaar/UPI rails + IndiaAI compute (38k GPUs); co-hosted the 2026 AI Impact Summit.
countries.caveat: No AI-localization mandate exists (a common overstatement); leverage is market + talent.

countries.name: Germany
countries.key: Zeiss optics & Trumpf lasers (essential to ASML's EUV) + ESMC Dresden fab + largest EU market; EU AI Act enforcement.

countries.name: France
countries.key: Mistral - the only democratic frontier-adjacent lab - + nuclear-powered compute (EUR109B) + GPAI/OECD seat & Paris Summit host.

countries.name: Saudi Arabia
countries.key: PIF sovereign capital + HUMAIN compute + cheap energy; first Arab GPAI member (2026).

countries.name: United Kingdom
countries.key: Arm - the CPU architecture behind >99% of mobile & much AI-edge compute - + elite talent + first AI (Security) Institute & Bletchley.
countries.caveat: DeepMind is Alphabet (US)-owned; UK did not sign the Paris 2025 declaration.

countries.name: Brazil
countries.key: Clean-energy data-centre host of the Americas (TikTok $37.7B in Ceara) + niobium & latent heavy-REE + Pix DPI (213M).
countries.caveat: Natural global-south anchor (clean energy + minerals + market).

countries.name: Canada
countries.key: Mila/Vector talent (#2 worldwide) & Cohere + hydro compute & a C$2B sovereign-compute fund; CAISI + GPAI co-founder.

countries.name: Singapore
countries.key: Temasek/GIC (~$1.3T) capital + governance leadership (Singapore Consensus) + orchestration of regional data centres.
countries.caveat: Electoral-authoritarian / hybrid regime - a values caveat for a democratic coalition.

countries.name: Australia
countries.key: Lynas - the only producer of separated HEAVY rare earths outside China - + lithium #1; new AISI (2025).

countries.name: Indonesia
countries.key: Nickel (~55-62% of mine supply) + 285M market / ASEAN's largest digital economy + Batam data centres.
countries.caveat: Refining is Chinese-controlled; grid coal-heavy; no AI law yet.

countries.name: South Africa
countries.key: Platinum-group metals incl. ruthenium/iridium (entering advanced chips) + African responsible-AI leadership (hosts GIRAI).
countries.caveat: Draft National AI Policy withdrawn Apr 2026 over AI-hallucinated citations; grid-constrained.

countries.name: Norway
countries.key: GPFG ($2.2T - largest transparent shareholder of the AI stack) + hydro-powered compute (Stargate Norway).
countries.caveat: Its capital is index-passive, not a deal vehicle.

countries.name: Israel
countries.key: Chip-design centres (Intel/Nvidia/Tower) + #1 per-capita AI talent density (AI21 Labs).
countries.caveat: Thin governance institutions; no AISI; not in the international network.

countries.name: United States
countries.key: The frontier pole: EDA + equipment + Nvidia GPUs + hyperscale compute + capital + export-control leverage.
countries.caveat: Reference benchmark - one of the two concentrated poles.

countries.name: China
countries.key: The other pole: ~70-90% of critical-mineral processing + scale compute, capital, models and market.
countries.caveat: Reference benchmark - the other concentrated pole.
